name: Localization & Accessibility Extractor
short_description: Audits NSLocalizedString / .xcstrings catalog coverage and Android strings.xml completeness, detects design-token adoption vs hardcoded UI values, and measures accessibility label coverage on interactive elements across SwiftUI, UIKit, Compose, and XML layouts.
tech_stack: SwiftSyntax — detects: NSLocalizedString(), String(localized:) (Xcode 15+), missing .accessibilityLabel() on interactive SwiftUI views, hardcoded string literals in UI-layer files
xcstrings parser (custom, JSON-based) — parses .xcstrings; computes translation state per key per locale; detects stale/new/needs-review keys
semgrep — detects hardcoded UI strings in Swift and Kotlin Compose
detekt (custom RuleSet) + Android Lint — Kotlin/Compose: missing contentDescription, hardcoded string literals, missing strings.xml entries
Google Accessibility Test Framework (ATF) — runtime accessibility checks; Compose 1.8.0+ enableAccessibilityChecks()
Android Lint (built-in) — MissingTranslation, HardcodedText, ContentDescription rules
tree-sitter — R.string.*, @StringRes, .xcstrings key references for usage graph
entity_model: Produces :LocalizationCoverage nodes (module, platform, locale, total_keys, translated_keys, stale_keys, missing_keys, coverage_pct). :HardcodedString nodes (file, line, literal_value_hash, ui_element_kind). :AccessibilityCoverage nodes (module, platform, element_kind, total_elements, labeled_elements, coverage_pct). :DesignTokenAdoption nodes (module, token_system, hardcoded_color_count, hardcoded_spacing_count, token_coverage_pct). :L10N_KEY nodes (key_id, default_locale_value_hash, locale_count, state). :REFERENCES edge from :File to :L10N_KEY. Faceted axes: semantic-kind=CoverageMetric, domain-concept=Localization+Accessibility, capability=:Audits.
storage_format: graph-node — coverage metrics are temporal; valid_from enables trend queries across releases

prior_art.name: Xcode String Catalogs (.xcstrings)
prior_art.description: Apple's official format (Xcode 15+, JSON-based). Xcode 26 adds auto-generated comments and symbol generation.

prior_art.name: Android Lint
prior_art.description: Built-in rules: MissingTranslation, HardcodedText, ContentDescription. Deterministic, zero-config.

prior_art.name: Google Accessibility Test Framework
prior_art.description: ATF performs touch target size, color contrast, content label checks at runtime. Compose 1.8.0+ enableAccessibilityChecks().

prior_art.name: SimpleLocalize xcstrings guide
prior_art.description: Documents xcstrings JSON structure and translation states.

consumer_query_patterns.label: Localization coverage by module and locale
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (lc:LocalizationCoverage {locale:$locale})-[:MEASURES]->(m:Module) WHERE lc.coverage_pct < 90 RETURN m.name, lc.coverage_pct, lc.missing_keys

consumer_query_patterns.label: Hardcoded UI strings in iOS presentation layer
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (hs:HardcodedString)-[:FOUND_IN]->(f:File)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(m:Module {platform:'iOS', layer:'presentation'}) RETURN f.path, hs.ui_element_kind, count(hs) AS count ORDER BY count DESC

consumer_query_patterns.label: Accessibility coverage for interactive elements by platform
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (ac:AccessibilityCoverage)-[:MEASURES]->(m:Module) WHERE ac.element_kind = 'button' RETURN m.name, m.platform, ac.coverage_pct ORDER BY ac.coverage_pct ASC

consumer_query_patterns.label: Design token adoption vs hardcoded colors per module
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (dt:DesignTokenAdoption)-[:MEASURES]->(m:Module) RETURN m.name, dt.token_system, dt.hardcoded_color_count, dt.token_coverage_pct ORDER BY dt.hardcoded_color_count DESC

graphiti_episode_type: EntityNode — :LocalizationCoverage and :AccessibilityCoverage persistent with temporal pct tracking. :HardcodedString nodes are EpisodicNode (appear/disappear per commit). :L10N_KEY nodes are EntityNode with long-lived identity (key string as stable ID).
ingest_perf_est: [uncertain] Full ingest: ~6–12 min on 350K LOC. Incremental: ~30–60 s on changed UI files.
failure_modes: String Catalogs auto-generated may be flagged as 'new' noisily
Non-localizable technical strings flagged as hardcoded UI unless excluded
Design token detection requires knowing project's token system
Accessibility ATF runtime checks require device/simulator — static analysis misses contrast failures
KMP Compose Multiplatform: accessibility semantics differ between iOS and Android Compose
Xcode 26 xcstrings v1.1: parser must handle v1.0 + v1.1
Dynamic strings (runtime-computed keys) fail semgrep matching
open_questions: Should :HardcodedString store literal or hash? Literal enables queries but may contain sensitive crypto domain text
Design token signals: standard set or per-project config?
xcstrings v1.1 (Xcode 26) format version negotiation in mixed-Xcode-version repos
ATF runtime vs static: add on-demand device trigger or stay static-only?
Stale key detection: :L10N_KEY nodes with no :REFERENCES edges — requires full-repo symbol scan
adversarial_resistance: medium — xcstrings parsing and Android Lint rules deterministic. Hardcoded detection bypassable by dynamic string construction.
regulatory_sensitivity: low — string literals may contain PII template strings. :HardcodedString nodes should hash literal values. Crypto wallet: seed phrase display strings must never be stored.
